channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Unga Group Appoints David Kiambi Following Patrick Obath's 13-Year Tenure
item.description: Unga Group has announced a change in its board of directors. Patrick Ochieng Obath, who has been with the company for 13 years, has stepped down from his role as an Independent Non-Executive Director....

item.title: CDC Monitors 41 Individuals for Andes Hantavirus Following Cruise Ship Exposure
item.description: The U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) is currently monitoring 41 people in the United States for potential exposure to the Andes hantavirus, following a rare outbreak on the MV Hon...

item.title: How Young Investors Are Responding to Labor’s Proposed Tax Changes
item.description: University student Mia Sinosic-Cass, 19, represents a growing segment of young Australians who actively invest in shares, exchange traded funds (ETFs), and cryptocurrency, treating them as a normal pa...

item.title: Pakistan Needs a Shared Fiscal Strategy to Revive Economy
item.description: Pakistan is heading into a challenging budget season as the economy faces multiple pressures. The formal sector is heavily taxed, investment remains weak, exports lag behind regional competitors, and ...

item.title: West Kelowna pizza shop owner reports theft during social media prank
item.description: Dalwinder Dub, the owner of Evergreen Pizzeria in West Kelowna, B.C., experienced a disturbing incident last Wednesday evening that appears to have been part of a social media prank. According to Dub,...

item.title: Daily Life in Qingdao During the German Colonial Period: Early 1900s
item.description: This article presents a collection of vintage photographs showcasing everyday life in Qingdao, China, during the early 1900s, a period when the city was under German colonial administration following ...

item.title: Aaron Taylor-Johnson discusses his role in London thriller 'Fuze' and working with Gugu Mbatha-Raw
item.description: Aaron Taylor-Johnson stars as Major Will Tranter in the new thriller 'Fuze', portraying an explosive ordnance disposal (EOD) specialist called to defuse a World War II bomb on a construction site in L...

item.title: Projected Fuel Price Changes for June in South Africa
item.description: South African motorists are likely to see a mixed bag at the pumps in June. While diesel prices are forecast to drop, petrol is expected to become more expensive. According to mid-month projections fr...

item.title: Tanzania sets Sh334 billion budget to boost tourism and conserve natural resources
item.description: Tanzania government imetangaza proposed Sh334 billion budget for the Ministry of Natural Resources and Tourism for 2026/27 financial year. The main focus ni kuimarisha tourism sector, conserve wildlif...

item.title: Smithsonian reinstates impeachment reference in Trump portrait exhibit
item.description: The Smithsonian Institution has restored a significant historical detail to the wall text accompanying Donald Trump's portrait at the National Portrait Gallery. The updated description now includes re...

item.title: Investigation Reveals How NEET-UG 2026 Chemistry Paper Was Leaked in Pune
item.description: The Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) has arrested PV Kulkarni, a retired chemistry teacher from Latur, Maharashtra, for allegedly orchestrating the leak of the NEET-UG 2026 examination papers. Th...

item.title: Tanzania Reports Moderate Inflation Drop in January 2026, Food Prices Also Eased
item.description: According to the National Bureau of Statistics (NBS) of Tanzania, the country's headline inflation slowed to 3.3% in January 2026, down from 3.6% in December 2025. Food and non-alcoholic beverages inf...

item.title: Trump-Xi Summit Shows Challenges in US-China Strategic Talks
item.description: The recent summit between US President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing concluded without any major breakthroughs, underlining the widening strategic gap between the two countr...

item.title: Senate Coup Raises Questions on Sara Duterte’s Impeachment Process
item.description: The article discusses the political maneuvers surrounding Sara Duterte’s impeachment in the Philippines. On the very day the House of Representatives impeached her, a sudden Senate leadership change o...

item.title: UDA Secures Wins in Narok, Samburu and Elgeyo Marakwet By-Elections Strengthening Ruto's Political Position
item.description: The ruling United Democratic Alliance (UDA) has scored a significant political victory after clinching all the recent by-elections held on Thursday in Narok, Samburu, and Elgeyo Marakwet counties. The...

item.title: Trump defends controversial statement on Americans' financial situation during Fox News interview
item.description: President Donald Trump faced widespread mockery after defending a controversial statement regarding Americans' financial well-being. In an interview with Fox News host Bret Baier, Trump reiterated a c...

item.title: Israel and Lebanon extend ceasefire by 45 days while tensions and strikes continue
item.description: Israel and Lebanon have agreed to extend their ongoing ceasefire by 45 days following two days of discussions in Washington, even as fresh Israeli strikes were reported in southern Lebanon. The extens...

item.title: Former Seme Customs Boss Accused of Allegedly Diverting N37.2bn Through Truck Collections
item.description: According to multiple sources wey sabi di matter, former Seme Border Area Comptroller of Customs, Adewale Adenuga, don dey accused of serious corruption and money diversion. E allegedly collect N4 mil...

item.title: Lahore High Court affirms widows’ entitlement to interest on delayed insurance claims
item.description: LAHORE: The Lahore High Court (LHC) has ruled in favour of widows and legal heirs of deceased State Life policyholders, ensuring they receive statutory interest on delayed group insurance payments. Th...

item.title: Government announces reforms to strengthen child support enforcement
item.description: Single parents in Canberra have welcomed federal budget changes aimed at overhauling the child support system. Many, like Rebecca and Natasha, have faced financial hardship due to unpaid child support...
